idea.title: ATS-Optimized Resume Bullet Rewriter by Job Description
idea.description: Prompts that help job seekers paste any job posting and transform weak, generic resume bullets into keyword-rich, metric-driven lines that pass applicant tracking systems.
idea.rationale: Massive urgent demand from millions of active job seekers, the JD-matching angle is highly specific and differentiated from generic resume tips, and AI excels at keyword extraction and bullet rewriting with consistent quality.
